subcodes.first_line: O Thou Concealer, Lord of mysteries! Through His Revelation the hidden secret and the treasured mystery hath become resplendent. This is the Day of vision [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ستار صاحب اسرار ظاهر و بظهورش سر مکنون و غیب مخزون باهر امروز روز بصر است
subcodes.subjects: @modes; manner; speed; size of divine revelation, @the power of words; of speech
